goal: Separate the two reward tracks — achievement (streak) decks exclusive to the ladder; all other decks go in the gacha
done: Added isGachaDeck(d)=d.role!=='streak-unlock' && d.id!=='moonmallow' + gachaDecks() in js/shop.js, and repointed the gacha gallery, pull pool, collection progress, and reel filler from getAllDecks() to gachaDecks(). The 9 streak-unlock 'achievement' decks + the free default moonmallow no longer appear in the gacha (gallery or pulls) — earned via the streak ladder only. Gacha pool = the 16 collectible decks (veila-tarot + the 15 'shop'-role AI decks). Progress reads 'X of 16'. Cache-bust 20260622h -> 20260622i; www synced.
fix: gacha gallery/pool/progress/reel filter to non-streak, non-default decks.
verified: headless shop.html: gallery shows 16 decks ('0 of 16' logged-out), streak decks absent
